text.title: Solo Alert Routing — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of `solo-alerting.yaml` and the per-source rule files. The apply-rules script pushes this config to each upstream tool.

forbidden.pattern: channels.primary same as channels.secondary_optional — defeats r4
s3 or s4 has allow_quiet_hours_break == true
sources.{name}.filter_rules_ref empty AND digest_window_min == 0 — per-event delivery without source filter

allowed-transformations.transformation: Add a new source (e.g. Stripe webhook errors) by extending `sources` and listing its severity mapping.
Tighten allow_list as confidence grows; never loosen without explicit log entry.
Promote an S3 class to S2 after demonstrated business impact; record the promotion event in audit log.

list.item: Severity matrix has all four levels filled
Sources each have source-side filter rules referenced
Quiet hours respected by S3 and S4
Allow-list contains only real-business-impact event classes
